title: polyscias neraudiana
intro: Polyscias neraudiana, also known as the Polyscias or Neuradis, is a plant species native to the tropical regions of Africa and Asia. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, including its antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Polyscias neraudiana include its ability to alleviate fever, reduce pain and inflammation, and treat digestive issues. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties, and it is also sometimes used in traditional African and Asian herbal remedies.
